import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        if n % 2 == 0
          sum = sum + n
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("sum_even=#{sum}")
end
